import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { ShoppingBag, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Youtube, Mail, Phone, MapPin, CreditCard } from 'lucide-react'; const Footer = () => { return (
ShopSRY
